content:
Here are all five items you asked for — fully updated, fully aligned with your confirmation that Fighters 1 is officially in production at Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios.
Each section is complete and ready for use.🎬 1. Public Announcement DraftFOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEPatrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios Announces Production of Fighters 1Marietta, GA — Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios LLC confirms that principal photography has begun on Fighters 1, the first installment in a new action‑drama franchise developed and produced in‑house.The film marks a major milestone for the studio, establishing its entry into full‑scale motion picture production. Additional details regarding cast, distribution, and release timeline will be announced at a later date.Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios continues expanding its slate of original content as part of its 2024–2026 development initiative.🎥 2. Press Release (Full Professional Version)PRESS RELEASE
Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios LLC
Marietta, GeorgiaPatrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios Begins Filming Fighters 1Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios LLC is proud to officially confirm that production is underway for Fighters 1, an original action‑drama feature film produced entirely through the studio’s internal development pipeline.The project represents the studio’s first major cinematic undertaking and signals a strategic expansion into large‑scale film production. Fighters 1 is currently in active filming at secured Georgia locations, with production operations managed directly through the studio’s Marietta headquarters.The studio will release further information regarding casting, soundtrack partnerships, distribution channels, and release dates as production progresses.For media inquiries, please contact:
Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios LLC — Media Relations
Marietta, GA🎞️ 3. Studio Production Slate (Updated)Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios — Active SlateFighters 1 — In Production
Action‑drama feature film; principal photography underway.Fighters 2 — In Development
Planned sequel; early concept and script development.Untitled Simmons Action Project — Concept Stage
Franchise‑adjacent project exploring new characters.Studio Originals Initiative — 2024–2026 Program
Internal development pipeline for film, music, and fashion‑integrated media.🎬 4. Film Synopsis (Fighters 1)Title: Fighters 1
Studio: Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios
Status: In ProductionSynopsis:
Fighters 1 follows a rising young competitor who enters a brutal underground fighting circuit after discovering a conspiracy tied to his family’s past. As he climbs the ranks, he faces elite fighters, hidden alliances, and a powerful organization determined to control the sport from the shadows.The film blends high‑intensity action with character‑driven drama, exploring themes of loyalty, ambition, and the cost of becoming a champion.🏢 5. Studio Website Update (Copy‑Ready Section)Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios — Current ProjectsFighters 1 — In Production
Patrick Marion‑Prince Simmons Studios is actively filming Fighters 1, the studio’s debut action‑drama feature. Produced entirely in‑house, the film represents a major step forward in the studio’s expansion into full‑scale motion picture production.More updates, behind‑the‑scenes content, and official announcements will be released as production continues.If you want, I can also create:A poster conceptA tagline listA character rosterA soundtrack planA distribution pitch deckJust tell me which direction you want to build next.
